extraction.one_line_summary: COSTA Rui won from the breakaway with a calculated sprint, holding off EVENEPOEL Remco's late charge by two seconds.
tactical_patterns: EVENEPOEL Remco closed 35 seconds in final kilometer on descent, nearly catching breakaway but mistimed effort by two seconds.
Jumbo-Visma forced to chase when VINGEGAARD Jonas's teammate went in dangerous 25-rider break with SOLER Marc and VLASOV.
BUITRAGO Santiago gained KOM points despite not contesting sprint, revealing breakaway stage can still serve GC secondary objectives.
KEMNA Leonard already stage winner got into break but COSTA Rui conserved energy throughout, never panicking despite Evenepoel's charge.

rider_signals.COSTA Rui: positive: Former world champion's sprint calculated perfectly, conserving energy through entire stage to hold off Evenepoel by two seconds
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: Closed 35 seconds in final kilometer alone, nearly bridging from peloton to breakaway on descent showing elite time-trial power
rider_signals.KEMNA Leonard: positive: Second break entry this Vuelta after already winning stage, consistently reading breakaway-suitable stages correctly
rider_signals.BUITRAGO Santiago: neutral: In break but didn't contest sprint, prioritizing KOM points over stage result reveals split objectives
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: negative: Teammate going in break forced Jumbo to chase, suggesting internal confusion about defending KUSS Sepp's jersey
